summary.objective: Produce the final workflow-level artifact from sample-level QC
notes: This workflow has one mandatory delivery artifact
Lint and report verification remain a separate final step

validations.name: multiqc_report_exists
validations.details: The final MultiQC HTML report was found on disk

validations.name: delivery_manifest_records_final_artifact
validations.details: The final report is listed in the delivery inventory
